caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVEZO SUIT" sits in front of a professional microphone in what appears to be a clothing store or studio. The background is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks featuring various garments. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left that says "THE" and another on the right that reads "PROPERLY FIT". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expression shifting slightly and his lips moving as he talks. He remains seated and stationary, facing slightly to the left, while the camera angle and background remain constant. The only movement is the natural animation of his speech and subtle shifts in his head position as he interacts with an unseen person.
